widget.name: web_ribbon
widget.title: Pending
widget.invisible: accountability_status != 'pending' or move_type not in ('entry') or not expense_ids

widget.name: web_ribbon
widget.title: Completed
widget.invisible: accountability_status != 'completed' or move_type not in ('entry') or not expense_ids

button.name: reject_order
button.invisible: state == 'draft' or state == 'rejected' or state == 'purchase' or state == 'done' or state == 'cancel'
